original_statement: how many entries in the 1800s have a water level above 250?
mutated_statement: how many entries in that period have a value both above 250 and below 250?
mutation_analysis: Time generalization + Attribute generalization + Logical contradiction: 1800s → that period (specific→anaphoric/generic) | water level → a value (specific field→generic) | above 250 → both above 250 and below 250 (single feasible condition→conjoined mutually exclusive conditions). (how many entries in the 1800s have a water level above 250? → how many entries in that period have a value both above 250 and below 250?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令 - 逻辑解释合理化
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中对结果的说明（“18 entries above 250… and 31 entries below 250… No entries equal to 250.”），agent并未报错或要求澄清，而是分别计算并说明了满足“>250”和“<250”两种互斥条件的计数。具体表现为：识别到条件互斥的语义（未找到等于250的条目），并通过事实性数据检索和说明来解释矛盾，使得原本互斥的要求在回答层面被合理化为“分别计数并陈述”。因此归入“逻辑解释合理化”，因为agent通过逻辑/数据说明矛盾不可同时成立并提供了基于事实的替代性回答。
